strategies.rationale: Implemented using an existing runnable strategy class with direct signal-generation semantics.

strategies.core_description: Collect positive perp funding while hedging directional exposure.

strategies.rationale: Requires full options chain, greeks, expiries, and multi-leg contract modeling.

strategies.core_description: Buy spot and short futures when annualized basis is attractive.

strategies.core_description: Trade convergence between perpetuals and futures when curve distorts.

strategies.core_description: Rotate into alts outperforming BTC or vice versa.

strategies.core_description: Trade residual mispricings after removing market and factor exposure.

strategies.core_description: Exploit mismatch between ETF market price and net asset value.

strategies.core_description: Trade options when implied volatility diverges from forecast realized volatility.

strategies.core_description: Trade correlation via long single-name vol and short index vol or vice versa.

strategies.core_description: Express a view that asset correlations will rise or fall.

strategies.core_description: Exploit valuation mismatch between ADR and local listing.

strategies.core_description: Trade temporary mispricing between separately listed shares of the same company.

strategies.core_description: Buy deeply discounted closed-end funds expecting discount to narrow.

strategies.core_description: Trade parent versus its listed stake in subsidiary when implied values diverge.

strategies.core_description: Exploit price differences across venues before they close.

strategies.core_description: Exploit stale quotes before slower venues update.

strategies.core_description: Quote both bid and ask, earning spread while managing inventory risk.

strategies.core_description: Own gamma and trade underlying around delta hedge to monetize movement.

strategies.core_description: Hold delta-neutral options expecting realized moves or IV expansion.

strategies.core_description: Harvest the typical premium of implied over realized volatility.

strategies.core_description: Trade relative richness of downside vs upside or one strike vs another.

strategies.core_description: Express a view on front-month vs back-month implied volatility.

strategies.core_description: Buy or sell options based on forecast of future realized volatility versus priced implied volatility.

strategies.core_description: Use machine-learning models to predict returns or classify trade opportunities.
strategies.notes: Prone to overfitting if poorly designed.

strategies.core_description: Change strategy mix based on inferred market regime such as trend, chop, or crisis.
strategies.rationale: Requires event/macro datasets and event-time alignment not yet available in core strategy contract.

strategies.core_description: Buy a call to express upside view with limited premium risk.

strategies.core_description: Buy a put to express downside view or hedge long exposure.
strategies.rationale: Requires full options chain, greeks, expiries, and multi-leg contract modeling.

strategies.core_description: Sell a call to collect premium, accepting potentially unlimited upside risk.

strategies.core_description: Sell a put to collect premium while agreeing to buy stock lower if assigned.
strategies.rationale: Requires full options chain, greeks, expiries, and multi-leg contract modeling.

strategies.core_description: Sell puts only when willing and funded to own the underlying at effective lower price.

strategies.core_description: Own stock and sell upside calls to generate income.

strategies.core_description: Hold short stock and sell puts against it to generate premium.

strategies.core_description: Buy puts to define downside risk on long stock.

strategies.core_description: Buy calls to cap risk on a short stock position.

strategies.core_description: Limit downside with put while financing it partly by selling upside call.

strategies.core_description: Buy stock and put together to create a defined-risk bullish position.

strategies.core_description: Use a deep ITM long-dated call instead of stock and sell shorter calls against it.

strategies.rationale: Options overlay/hedging construct depends on portfolio holdings and derivatives engine context.

strategies.core_description: Sell puts to enter stock, then sell covered calls after assignment.

strategies.core_description: Generate premium on both sides while long stock; downside risk increases due to short put.
strategies.rationale: Options overlay/hedging construct depends on portfolio holdings and derivatives engine context.

strategies.core_description: Defined-risk bullish position using calls.
strategies.notes: Cheaper than long call but capped upside.

strategies.core_description: Defined-risk premium-selling trade that benefits if price stays below short strike.

strategies.core_description: Defined-risk bullish premium-selling trade.
strategies.rationale: Requires full options chain, greeks, expiries, and multi-leg contract modeling.

strategies.core_description: Defined-risk bearish position using puts.

strategies.core_description: Buy both call and put to profit from a large move either way.

strategies.core_description: Sell both call and put to collect premium if price stays near strike.

strategies.core_description: Cheaper than straddle but needs larger move.

strategies.core_description: Collect premium if underlying stays in range between strikes.

strategies.core_description: Long-vol structure with greater profit if move is downward.

strategies.core_description: Long-vol structure with greater profit if move is upward.

strategies.core_description: Defined-risk strategy targeting expiration near middle strike.

strategies.core_description: Economically similar to call butterfly but built with puts.

strategies.core_description: Profit if price moves away from middle strike, opposite of long butterfly.

strategies.core_description: Inverse put-based butterfly; benefits from movement away from center strike.

strategies.core_description: Defined-risk short-premium strategy centered on one strike.

strategies.core_description: Inverse of long condor; benefits from bigger move.

strategies.core_description: Defined-risk short-premium strategy that profits if price stays within wide range.

strategies.core_description: Butterfly with unequal wings to reduce or eliminate debit while leaning one direction.

strategies.core_description: Asymmetric condor that widens one side to better match directional bias or skew.
strategies.rationale: Requires full options chain, greeks, expiries, and multi-leg contract modeling.

strategies.core_description: Sell near-term decay while owning longer-dated call.

strategies.core_description: Put-based version of calendar spread.

strategies.core_description: Own back-month options and sell two front-month options at different strikes.

strategies.core_description: Hybrid of vertical and calendar, with directional bullish bias.

strategies.core_description: Bearish hybrid of vertical and calendar spread.
strategies.notes: Flexible structure for mild bearish outlook.

strategies.core_description: Two diagonals used together for a wider range than a double calendar.

strategies.core_description: Trade implied financing rate embedded in options across expirations.
strategies.rationale: Requires full options chain, greeks, expiries, and multi-leg contract modeling.

strategies.core_description: Express mild bullish view while financing longs by selling more upside.

strategies.core_description: Express mild bearish view while selling extra downside premium.
strategies.rationale: Requires full options chain, greeks, expiries, and multi-leg contract modeling.

strategies.core_description: Benefits from strong upside move and/or rising volatility.
strategies.rationale: Requires full options chain, greeks, expiries, and multi-leg contract modeling.

strategies.core_description: Benefits from strong downside move and/or volatility expansion.
strategies.rationale: Requires full options chain, greeks, expiries, and multi-leg contract modeling.

strategies.core_description: Overwrite with more calls than underlying coverage to increase premium.

strategies.core_description: Extension of bull call spread that adds extra short call for more credit.
strategies.rationale: Requires full options chain, greeks, expiries, and multi-leg contract modeling.

strategies.core_description: Extension of bear put spread that adds extra short put for more credit.

strategies.core_description: Replicate long stock exposure using options.
strategies.notes: Useful for capital or tax considerations.

strategies.core_description: Replicate short stock exposure using options.

strategies.core_description: Economically similar to a long call using stock plus put.
strategies.notes: Another way to frame protective put.

strategies.core_description: Economically similar to a long put using short stock plus call.
strategies.notes: Another way to frame protective call.

strategies.core_description: Replicate short call exposure through short stock and short put.

strategies.core_description: Replicate short put exposure using stock and short call.

strategies.core_description: Lock in theoretical carry when options and stock violate parity.

strategies.core_description: Opposite of conversion; profit from reverse parity mispricing.
strategies.rationale: Requires full options chain, greeks, expiries, and multi-leg contract modeling.

strategies.core_description: Create fixed payoff regardless of underlying, effectively lending or borrowing via options.

strategies.core_description: Express bullish view with limited upfront cost by selling downside to buy upside.

strategies.core_description: Express bearish view by selling upside to finance downside protection.

strategies.core_description: Modify a collar with an extra option leg to reduce hedge cost and reshape payoff.

strategies.core_description: Short-premium structure designed to avoid upside risk beyond collected credit.
strategies.rationale: Requires full options chain, greeks, expiries, and multi-leg contract modeling.

strategies.core_description: Use deep ITM options to approximate stock-like delta with less extrinsic value exposure.
strategies.rationale: Requires full options chain, greeks, expiries, and multi-leg contract modeling.

strategies.core_description: Split a large order evenly through time to reduce market impact.
strategies.rationale: Execution algorithm belongs to execution/routing layer, not signal strategy layer.

strategies.core_description: Trade in line with expected market volume to target VWAP benchmark.
strategies.rationale: Execution algorithm belongs to execution/routing layer, not signal strategy layer.

strategies.core_description: Participate with a set fraction of market volume as it trades.
strategies.rationale: Execution algorithm belongs to execution/routing layer, not signal strategy layer.

strategies.core_description: Balance timing risk against market impact relative to arrival price benchmark.
strategies.rationale: Execution algorithm belongs to execution/routing layer, not signal strategy layer.

strategies.core_description: Show only a portion of a larger order to minimize signaling.

strategies.core_description: Wait for moments of favorable liquidity to execute aggressively.
strategies.rationale: Execution algorithm belongs to execution/routing layer, not signal strategy layer.

strategies.core_description: Route orders to the closing auction to match index or NAV benchmarks.

strategies.core_description: Use the opening auction for price discovery and benchmarked fills.

strategies.core_description: Route child orders across venues to optimize fill quality and minimize fees/impact.

strategies.core_description: Access hidden liquidity and midpoint fills for large blocks or sensitive orders.
strategies.rationale: Execution algorithm belongs to execution/routing layer, not signal strategy layer.
